To reset your password, go to the login page and click 'Forgot Password'. Follow the instructions sent to your email.
You can update your billing information in your account settings under the 'Billing' section.
Refunds are processed within 5 to 7 business days after approval.
To cancel your subscription, go to settings and click on 'Cancel Plan'.
If your payment fails, please check your card details or contact your bank.
You can upgrade your plan anytime from the pricing page.
Customer support is available 24/7 via live chat or email.
To delete your account, go to account settings and select 'Delete Account'.
Your data is stored securely and encrypted at rest.
You will receive a confirmation email after any successful transaction.
If you forgot your username, try logging in with your registered email address.
Subscription renewals happen automatically unless cancelled before the billing date.
To download invoices, go to the billing section in your account.
Discount codes can be applied during checkout.
If the app is not working, try restarting it or reinstalling the latest version.
We support Visa, MasterCard, and PayPal for payments.
You can change your password anytime in the security settings.
To contact support, submit a ticket through the help center.
Refund eligibility depends on our refund policy.
Your account will be locked after multiple failed login attempts.
